title: SCP-002, The Living Room
description: A living ball of flesh that turns its victims into furniture.
body:
The Living Room adds a new item. Its history comes from the SCP universe, where it is referred to as SCP-002, also known as the Living Room.


SCP-002 resembles a large, fleshy ball with an iron valve on its front. Inside lies a small, fleshy room filled with furniture, but these are anything but ordinary. The anomaly consumes living creatures that enter SCP-002, transforming them into pieces of furniture to decorate its interior. The valve opens and closes on its own depending on nearby movement, as if the room itself is alive and waiting for its next victim.

## **Updates continue on Curseforge** ##

- A mod made by Zcoper
- Mod created with MCreator!
- Requires Geckolib

● Visit my Discord Server!
[https://discord.gg/akP56NtmVQ](https://discord.gg/akP56NtmVQ)



● Important FaQ

<details>
<summary>Spoiler</summary>



► Why are features missing in different versions?

It is recommended to play the newest versions of higher minecraft versions.

Not all features of MCreator available or the same in different versions.
For example: Version 1.19.2 doesn't have the feature of shield, better structure generation or custom villagers, but Version 1.20.1 does have them.

► Where does SCP-002 spawn?

SCP-002 spawns in a containment chamber, usually underground in the overworld. There may be multiple SCP-002s.

</details>



![SCP-002](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/3beff4d6864bdf344d192a48513083c290b62b6d_0.webp)

SCP-002 spawns underground within a containment chamber. It appears as a massive fleshy sphere with an iron valve leading into a small interior room. When no living entities are inside, the valve opens automatically when a player approaches within 5 blocks and closes when the player moves away. Once a mob or player enters, the valve seals shut until the entity dies. The valve cannot be opend by yourself and the blocks SCP-002 is made of, are indestructible. While inside, movement is slowed heavily due to the organic floor, and SCP-002 slowly consumes the victim by dealing damage over time. When a player dies inside, a random piece of furniture, such as a couch, a table, a lamp, a shelf, a tv, a rug, a flower pot, a radio or books will appear. Those furniture represent the remains of the consumed entity. Non-player mobs are also absorbed, though they leave nothing behind. 

 

- Config File not inculed.
- You are all allowed to use this mod in your modpacks!
- Do not port my mods without permission!
